scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ddre/contracts && npm run build --workspace @ddre/api && npm run build --workspace @ddre/desktop && npm run build --workspace @ddre/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ddre/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @ddre/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @ddre/desktop && npm run typecheck --workspace @ddre/web
